SscDashboard.description: Calculates cumulative rankings by adding points and honor earned through the selected round.

SscDashboard.compare-server-description: Add as many servers as needed, including the primary server, to compare cumulative trends.
SscDashboard.ranking-rule: When cumulative points are tied, the server with more cumulative honor ranks higher.

SscDashboard.round-honor-description: Honor earned in the selected round
SscDashboard.compare-summary-description: Compare cumulative results through the selected round at a glance.

SscDashboard.cumulative-point-compare-description: Compares cumulative points as rounds progress.
SscDashboard.cumulative-honor-compare-description: Compares cumulative honor, which breaks ties in points.
SscDashboard.round-earned-description: Points and honor earned by the primary server in each round.
SscDashboard.highlight-description: Servers selected for comparison are highlighted with unique colors.
SscDashboard.rank-no-change: No change from the previous cumulative ranking
SscDashboard.no-server-selected-description: Select a primary server to view cumulative rankings and comparison results.

Developer.title: Making Top War a Little Easier

Developer.notice-personal-description: This website is independently developed and maintained. Some information may differ from the latest in-game data.
Developer.notice-feature-description: Send your feature requests or improvement suggestions through KakaoTalk or Discord.
Developer.notice-chat-description-prefix: You can also send an in-game message to
Developer.profile-description: Just a regular Top War player who enjoys building simulation and automation tools.
Developer.contact-description: Send bug reports or feature suggestions through whichever channel is most convenient.
Developer.support-note: Help keep these tools free for everyone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Progamer.info is a personally operated game data analysis and utility website.

notice.title: Unofficial Fan Website Notice
notice.body: This website is not an official Top War website. It is an unofficial fan utility website operated personally.

summary.title: Summary
items: This website does not provide a membership registration feature.
This website does not directly collect personal information such as names, addresses, or phone numbers.
Cookies may be used for analytics and advertising.
Privacy practices on external websites are governed by the policies of those websites.

sections.title: 1. General Information
sections.body: Progamer.info values user privacy. This website does not provide a membership registration feature and does not directly collect personal information such as names, addresses, or phone numbers.

sections.title: 2. Analytics
sections.body: This website may use third-party analytics tools such as Google Analytics to improve the service and analyze usage. During this process, information such as visited pages, device environment, browser information, and approximate location may be collected through cookies or similar technologies.

sections.title: 3. Advertising and Cookies
sections.body: This website may use third-party advertising services such as Google AdSense. Third-party vendors, including Google, may use cookies to serve personalized ads based on a user's prior visits.

sections.title: 4. Cookie Management
sections.body: Users can refuse cookie storage or delete existing cookies through their browser settings. However, blocking cookies may cause some features or advertisements to not function properly.

sections.title: 5. External Links
sections.body: This website may contain links to external websites such as Discord, KakaoTalk, GitHub, YouTube, or other services. Privacy practices on external websites are governed by the policies of those websites.

sections.title: 6. Game-related Data
sections.body: Game-related calculations, rankings, simulations, and information provided on this website are for reference only. Game names, images, data, trademarks, and related materials belong to their respective rights holders.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.body: For inquiries related to this Privacy Policy or the use of this website, please contact us through the contact page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: You can contact us by email for site errors, data correction requests, or feature suggestions.

notice.title: Please read before contacting
notice.body: Progamer.info is an unofficial fan utility website operated personally. For game accounts, payments, or official support issues, please contact the game operator directly.

methods.title: Email
methods.description: For site operation, privacy, advertising, and error reports

notes.title: Helpful information to include
items: The page URL where the issue occurred
Your selected language and device environment
The situation or input values that caused the issue
Screenshots or steps to reproduce the issue
For data correction requests, the related server number and reference date

footer.title: Operation Notice
footer.body: This website is operated as a personal project, and responses may not be immediate. However, reports about site errors, incorrect data, or usability issues will be reviewed when possible.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.subtitle: This page explains the scope and limitations of the information and features provided by Progamer.info.

notice.title: Unofficial Fan Website Notice
notice.body: Progamer.info is not an official Top War website and is operated personally without direct affiliation with the game operator.

summary.title: Summary
items: This website is not an official Top War website.
Calculations, rankings, and simulation results are provided for reference only.
Game names, images, data, trademarks, and related materials belong to their respective rights holders.
Users are responsible for their own decisions and actions based on information from this website.

sections.title: 1. Unofficial Website Notice
sections.body: Progamer.info is an unofficial fan utility website operated personally. This website is not an official Top War website and is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or approved by the game operator or related companies.

sections.title: 2. Game-related Information
sections.body: Calculators, simulators, rankings, guides, and data analysis materials provided on this website are intended as reference information to support gameplay. Actual in-game values, results, policies, and event details may change according to updates by the game operator.

sections.title: 3. Accuracy of Information
sections.body: Progamer.info strives to provide accurate information, but does not guarantee the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of all information. Calculation or simulation results may differ from actual in-game results.

sections.title: 4. Ownership of Rights
sections.body: Game names, images, icons, data, trademarks, and other related materials, including those related to Top War, belong to their respective rights holders. This website does not officially own or represent those materials.

sections.title: 5. User Responsibility
sections.body: In-game decisions, purchases, account management, server transfers, event participation, and other actions based on information from this website are made at the user's own discretion and responsibility. This website is not responsible for any loss or disadvantage resulting from such actions.

footer.title: Contact and Correction Requests
footer.body: If you find incorrect information, have concerns about rights infringement, or want to request a data correction, please contact us through the contact page. We will review and respond within a reasonable scope.

header.title: Special Package Shop Calculator
header.description: Select the skill shard packages you plan to purchase and calculate the total payment, final shard amount, and effective cost per shard after applying double coupons.

package.title: Skill Shard Packages
package.description: Selecting the final package tier automatically selects all preceding tiers.

summary.title: Purchase Summary
summary.emptyDescription: Select a package to display the calculation results.
summary.discountMessage: Double coupons reduced the effective unit cost by {{percent}}%.
summary.bonusMessage: You receive {{count}} additional skill shards for the same payment.

guide.introductionTitle: What Is the Special Package Shop Calculator?
guide.introduction1: This tool calculates the total purchase price and number of skill shards obtained from Special Package Shop offers. When you select a package tier, all preceding tiers are included automatically. You can also apply a double coupon to individual packages and compare the resulting cost per shard.
guide.introduction2: Higher-tier packages may appear more expensive when comparing only their prices. Because each package provides a different number of shards, the cost per shard is a more useful measure of actual value.
guide.usage1: Select the purchase checkbox for the highest package tier you plan to buy.
guide.usage2: All preceding package tiers are automatically included.
guide.usage3: Select the double-coupon checkbox for each package where a coupon will be used.
guide.usage4: Review the total payment, final shard amount, and average cost per shard in the summary.
guide.exampleDescription: The tier 1 package provides 40 skill shards for 7,000 KRW, resulting in a base cost of 175 KRW per shard. With a double coupon, the same payment provides 80 shards, reducing the cost to 87.5 KRW per shard.
guide.caution1: This calculator assumes that packages must be purchased sequentially from the lowest tier.
guide.caution2: A double coupon does not reduce the package price. It doubles the number of skill shards received.
guide.caution3: Actual prices may vary depending on the device, app store, country, exchange rate, or game policy.
guide.caution4: The results may differ if package prices or shard amounts are changed in a future game update.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.question1: Can I purchase only a package from the middle of the sequence?
faq.answer1: This calculator follows a sequential purchase system in which earlier tiers must be purchased before later tiers are unlocked. Selecting a tier automatically includes all preceding tiers.
faq.question2: Does using a double coupon also double the price?
faq.answer2: No. The payment remains the same, while only the number of skill shards received is doubled.
faq.question3: Which package is the best one for a double coupon?
faq.answer3: A double coupon provides a larger bonus when used on a package with more base shards. Coupon eligibility and the number of coupons available should also be considered.

aria.doubleCoupon: Apply a double coupon to tier {{stage}} package

header.title: Exclusive Skill Calculator
header.description: Calculate the exclusive skill shards required for your target level and include your currently owned shards and lower-level exclusive skills to see the remaining shortage.

price.label: 1. Price of a Level 1 Exclusive Skill
price.description: Select the number of exclusive skill shards required to purchase the hero's Level 1 exclusive skill.

target.label: 2. Target Exclusive Skill Level
target.description: Select the final exclusive skill level you want to create.
target.required: You need {{count}} shards to reach the target level.

ownedShard.title: 3. Exclusive Skill Shards You Own
ownedShard.toggle: I currently have exclusive skill shards.

ownedSkill.title: 4. Exclusive Skills You Own
ownedSkill.toggle: I already have lower-level exclusive skills.
ownedSkill.noLowerLevel: There are no lower-level exclusive skills to enter because the target is Level 1.
ownedSkill.convertedTotal: Your owned exclusive skills are worth {{count}} shards.

result.title: Calculation Result
result.successTitle: You can create the target level.
result.successRemaining: After crafting, {{count}} shards of value will remain.
result.shortageTitle: You need more exclusive skill shards.

guide.introductionTitle: What Is the Exclusive Skill Calculator?
guide.introduction1: This calculator shows the total number of exclusive skill shards required to create a target exclusive skill level. It includes both loose shards and lower-level exclusive skills by converting them into their shard value.
guide.introduction2: The base purchase price differs by hero, so select the correct hero price before checking the result.
guide.usage1: Select the exclusive skill purchase price for the hero.
guide.usage2: Select the exclusive skill level you want to create.
guide.usage3: Enter the number of loose exclusive skill shards you currently own.
guide.usage4: Enter the number of lower-level exclusive skills you already own for each level.
guide.usage5: Check the additional shards required or the amount remaining after crafting.
guide.calculationDescription: The required value triples each time the exclusive skill level increases by one.
guide.targetFormulaTitle: Shards Required for the Target Level
guide.exampleDescription: The following example creates a Level 7 exclusive skill with a base price of 25 shards.
guide.caution1: Select the correct exclusive skill purchase price for the hero.
guide.caution2: The actual result may differ if crafting rules or prices change after a game update.
guide.caution3: Only skills below the selected target level can be entered as owned skills.
guide.caution4: The result is based on shard value and does not include any other in-game crafting requirements.

example.ownedLevel5: Value of one owned Level 5 skill

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.question1: Are owned exclusive skills converted into shards?
faq.answer1: Yes. Each owned exclusive skill is converted into the shard value required to craft that level and included in your total owned value.
faq.question2: Why are the purchase prices different?
faq.answer2: The base price of a Level 1 exclusive skill differs by hero. Check the hero's price before calculating.
faq.question3: What should I do if the result differs from the game?
faq.answer3: First verify the selected purchase price and owned quantities. The calculation may differ if the game's crafting rules or prices have changed.

header.title: Vitality Recovery Speed Calculator
header.description: Calculate your current vitality recovery interval and compare how much a new decoration reduces the recovery time.

current.title: Enter Current Base Information
current.description: Open the Base Information screen in the game and enter the displayed Vitality Recovery Speed and Base Vitality Recovery Speed.
current.imageAlt: Location of vitality recovery speed values on the Base Information screen
current.resultDescription: The estimated interval required to recover 1 vitality with the current settings.

decoration.title: Enter Decoration Information
decoration.description: Enter the Base Vitality Recovery Speed bonus of the decoration you plan to purchase or place.
decoration.imageAlt: Location of the base vitality recovery speed bonus on the decoration information screen
decoration.addSpeedLabel: Decoration's Base Vitality Recovery Speed Bonus
decoration.resultLabel: Time to recover 1 vitality after applying the decoration
decoration.resultDescription: The estimated interval required to recover 1 vitality after applying the entered decoration.

comparison.title: Effect Comparison
comparison.theoreticalNotice: Hourly and daily recovery values are theoretical estimates that assume vitality is continuously consumed and recovery never stops.

validation.invalid: Enter a valid number of 0 or greater in every field.

guide.introductionTitle: What Is the Vitality Recovery Speed Calculator?
guide.introduction1: This tool calculates the actual time required to recover 1 vitality using the Vitality Recovery Speed and Base Vitality Recovery Speed shown in Base Information.
guide.introduction2: Enter a decoration's Base Vitality Recovery Speed bonus to compare the recovery interval, time reduction, improvement percentage, and estimated recovery amount before and after applying it.
guide.usage1: Open Base Information in the game and locate Vitality Recovery Speed and Base Vitality Recovery Speed.
guide.usage2: Enter both values exactly as displayed in the first input section.
guide.usage3: Enter the Base Vitality Recovery Speed bonus of the decoration you plan to purchase or place.
guide.usage4: Review the recovery time and estimated hourly and daily recovery before and after applying the decoration.
guide.formulaDescription: The calculation starts from a base recovery time of 360 seconds and applies the relationship between total recovery speed and base recovery speed.
guide.currentFormula: ((100 - Vitality Recovery Speed + Base Vitality Recovery Speed) ÷ (100 + Base Vitality Recovery Speed)) × 360 seconds
guide.futureFormula: ((100 - (Vitality Recovery Speed + Decoration Bonus) + (Base Vitality Recovery Speed + Decoration Bonus)) ÷ (100 + Base Vitality Recovery Speed + Decoration Bonus)) × 360 seconds
guide.caution1: Enter the percentage values exactly as displayed in the game.
guide.caution2: For better accuracy, do not round values that include decimal places.
guide.caution3: Hourly and daily recovery amounts assume that vitality never reaches its maximum capacity.
guide.caution4: Actual results may differ if the recovery formula changes in a future game update.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.question1: What is the difference between Vitality Recovery Speed and Base Vitality Recovery Speed?
faq.answer1: Vitality Recovery Speed includes the currently applied total bonuses, while Base Vitality Recovery Speed is a separate value used by the formula. Both values are required for an accurate result.
faq.question2: Which decoration value should I enter?
faq.answer2: Enter the Base Vitality Recovery Speed percentage shown in the decoration details. Do not confuse it with a general Vitality Recovery Speed bonus.
faq.question3: Why should I enter decimal values?
faq.answer3: Even a small difference in the percentage can change the recovery interval by several seconds. Enter the displayed decimal value whenever available.
